title: Shape Avatar Gallery
description: Create an avatar gallery where each profile image uses a different clip-path shape (circle, hexagon, diamond, triangle).
hint: Apply different clip-path values to each avatar image.

title: Hover Shape Morph Cards
description: Create a card grid where each card morphs from one shape to another on hover using clip-path transitions.
hint: Set matching vertex counts for smooth morphing between shapes.
criteria: All cards morph to the same hover shape

title: Creative Section Dividers
description: Build a multi-section page where each section divider uses a different clip-path shape for seamless transitions.
hint: Use clip-path on section elements to create diagonal, curved, or wavy bottom edges.

title: Animated Shape Gallery
description: Create a gallery where images cycle through different clip-path shapes in a continuous animation.
hint: Use @keyframes with clip-path changes at different percentages, keeping vertex counts consistent.
